case_title: THIET THANH NGUYEN VS. ENCOREMARKETING GROUP,INC A NORTH CAROLINA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, THIET THANH AS TO DEFENDANT ENCOREMARKETING GROUP,INC A NORTH CAROLINA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, THIET THANH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ENCOREMARKETING GROUP,INC A NORTH CAROLINA CORPORATION $7,801.12 PRINCIPAL, $76.98 INTEREST, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,058.10, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
